# Lịch Ta

Lịch Ta is a Vietnamese lunar calendar tool served at:

```text
https://app.pdl.vn/lich-ta
```

It supports browser, iframe, JavaScript embed, plain text, and Markdown output.

## URL Patterns

- `/lich-ta/` shows today's month.
- `/lich-ta/YYYY-MM-DD` shows a solar Gregorian date.
- `/lich-ta/lYYYY-MM-DD` shows a lunar date and converts it to the matching solar date.

Examples:

```text
https://app.pdl.vn/lich-ta/2026-02-17
https://app.pdl.vn/lich-ta/l2026-01-01
```

Both examples point to Tết Nguyên Đán 2026.

## Programmatic Use

Ask for Markdown:

```bash
curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://app.pdl.vn/lich-ta/2026-02-17
```

Ask for plain text:

```bash
curl -H "Accept: text/plain" https://app.pdl.vn/lich-ta/2026-02-17
```

## Embed

Iframe:

```html
<iframe src="https://app.pdl.vn/lich-ta/embed.php" width="100%" height="620" style="border:0;max-width:760px;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

JavaScript:

```html
<div id="pdl-lich-ta"></div>
<script src="https://app.pdl.vn/lich-ta/embed.js" data-target="pdl-lich-ta" async></script>
```
